name: CASH 1 Loans
description_short: CASH 1 Loans offers title loans up to $50,000 and personal loans ($50-$1,000) with same-day funding at Nevada locations. All credit profiles welcome with approval in as fast as 15 minutes.
description_long:
CASH 1 Loans operates as a licensed lending service with multiple locations across Nevada, including the Las Vegas N. Nellis Blvd location. The company specializes in fast-turnaround secured and unsecured lending products designed for consumers needing immediate access to cash. With a physical storefront presence and online application capability, CASH 1 positions itself as an accessible alternative to traditional bank lending. The company has been operating since at least the mid-1990s based on its branding, suggesting established operations in the non-prime lending space.

CASH 1 Loans offers two primary loan products: Title Loans (using vehicle title as collateral for up to $50,000) and Personal Loans ($50 to $1,000). The N. Nellis location operates extended hours (8am-9pm Monday-Saturday, 11am-5pm Sunday) and advertises approval timelines as fast as 15 minutes with same-day cash disbursement. Applicants can apply online, by phone at (888) 858-9333, or in person. The company advertises that applications don't impact credit scores and welcomes all credit profiles.

CASH 1 distinguishes itself through aggressive speed-to-funding messaging ("Approval in as fast as 15 Mins"), extended retail hours for in-person service, physical store locations providing face-to-face lending, and a mobile app for loan management and additional borrowing. The marketing emphasizes accessibility ("All Credit Welcome") and the ability to borrow up to 3x more through title loans versus personal loans. Multiple Nevada store locations and clear application pathways suggest an established regional operation.

As with all title and emergency-cash lenders, consumers should note that CASH 1's actual APR, fee structures, and loan terms are not disclosed on the location page. Title loans inherently carry risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed. Personal loans at $50-$1,000 thresholds with rapid approval typically carry higher interest rates than traditional lenders. No information is provided about income verification standards, credit score minimums, or default consequences.
address: 985 W Elliot Rd UNIT 7, Chandler, AZ 85225

company_info.headquarters: 985 W Elliot Rd UNIT 7, Chandler, AZ 85225

pros: Same-day cash funding advertised with approval as fast as 15 minutes
High loan amount options via title loans ($50,000 maximum) for collateral-backed borrowing
Extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays/Saturday, 11am-5pm Sunday) enable after-hours and weekend lending access
Multiple application channels: online, phone, and in-person at physical locations
All credit profiles welcome—no minimum credit score stated as barrier
Mobile app for loan management and accessing additional funds without re-applying
Clear vehicle title requirement eliminates income verification ambiguity for title loans
cons: Title loans carry repossession risk if payments are missed or defaulted
No APR, interest rates, fees, or complete loan term details disclosed on location page
Personal loans capped at $1,000 maximum—limited for larger emergency needs
Vehicle collateral requirement for larger loans creates accessibility barrier for non-vehicle owners
Extended hours and rapid approval typical of high-cost lending suggest above-market interest rates
best_for: Vehicle owners needing $5,000-$50,000 quickly for emergencies who can accept collateral risk
Consumers with poor or no credit history unable to access traditional bank loans
People needing $50-$1,000 in personal loans with same-day funding capability
Borrowers in Las Vegas/Nevada area requiring physical in-person lending without credit score barriers
diagnosis: CASH 1 Loans is best suited for vehicle owners or those with clear titles who need $1,000-$50,000 quickly and have limited traditional lending options due to credit profile. Primary caveat: title loans risk vehicle repossession on default, and lack of disclosed APR/fees suggests rates significantly above bank lending—consumers should obtain complete rate and term details before committing.
services: Title Loans up to $50,000 using vehicle title as collateral
In-person application at physical store locations
Additional cash advances through mobile app without full re-application
No credit score impact from application inquiry
